sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Adobe FY25 Q4 및 연간 사상 최고 매출 달성, FY25 영업현금흐름 100억 달러 돌파

keyPoints.text: FY25 4분기 매출은 61억 9,000만 달러로 전년 대비 10% 성장하며 분기 최고 실적을 기록했다. FY25 연간 매출은 237억 7,000만 달러로 11% 성장했으며, FY25 연간 영업 현금흐름은 100억 달러를 초과했다.
GAAP EPS는 4.45달러, non-GAAP EPS는 5.50달러였다. 분기 영업 현금흐름은 31억 6,000만 달러로 사상 최고였다.
회사는 FY26 Total Adobe ARR이 10% 이상 성장하는 것을 목표로 하며, AI 솔루션 기반 수익성 있는 성장에 자신감을 표명했다.

businessChanges.text: Digital Media 세그먼트 매출은 46억 2,000만 달러로 전년 대비 11% 성장했다. Digital Media ARR은 분기 말 기준 성장세를 유지했다.
Q4 구독 매출은 59억 6,000만 달러(YoY +12%), Business Professionals & Consumers는 17억 2,000만 달러(+15%), Creative & Marketing Professionals는 42억 5,000만 달러(+11%)였다.
분기 말 RPO는 225억 2,000만 달러, cRPO 비율은 65%였다. 자사주 약 720만 주를 매입했다.

financialHighlights.text: FY25 Q4 매출 61억 9,000만 달러(YoY +10%), 분기 사상 최고.
GAAP EPS 4.45달러, non-GAAP EPS 5.50달러; non-GAAP 순이익 22억 9,000만 달러.
분기 영업 현금흐름 31억 6,000만 달러, RPO 225억 2,000만 달러.
FY25 연간 매출 237억 7,000만 달러(YoY +11%), 연간 영업현금흐름 100억 달러 초과.

watchItems.text: FY26 Total ARR 10% 이상 성장 목표 달성 여부가 Q1 실적에서 첫 신호로 확인될 것이며, AI-first 상품 전환 속도가 핵심 지표다.
Digital Experience 세그먼트의 수익 기여도가 커지는 추세인지, 제품 포트폴리오 다변화가 마진 구조에 미치는 영향을 다음 분기에 점검해야 한다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 adbeex991q425.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Investor Relations Contact Doug Clark Adobe ir@adobe.com Public Relations Contact Ashley Levine Adobe adobepr@adobe.com FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Adobe Reports Record Q4 and FY2025 Revenue • Exceeds target for FY2025 Digital Media ending ARR and targets FY2026 Total Adobe ending ARR to grow over 10% • Delivers record operating cash flows of over $10 billion in FY2025 SAN JOSE, Calif. – Dec. 10, 2025 – Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE), the global technology leader that unleashes creativity and productivity for individuals and businesses through innovative platforms and tools, today reported financial results for its fourth quarter and FY2025 ended Nov. 28, 2025. “Adobe’s record FY2025 results reflect our growing importance in the global AI ecosystem and the rapid adoption of our AI-driven tools,” said Shantanu Narayen, chair and CEO, Adobe. “By  Normalized numeric aliases: $10 billion = 100억 달러; $10 = 10달러.

our innovative generative and agentic platforms and expanding our customer base, we are excited to target double-digit ARR growth in FY2026.” “Adobe delivered another outstanding year, fueled by strong global demand for our AI solutions across Business Professionals & Consumers and Creative & Marketing Professionals customer groups,” said Dan Durn, executive vice president and CFO, Adobe. “Looking ahead to FY2026, we are confident in our ability to deliver industry-leading innovations, double-digit ARR growth and world class profitability.” Fourth Quarter FY2025 Financial Highlights • Adobe achieved record revenue of $6.19 billion in its fourth quarter of FY2025, which represents 10% year-over-year growth as reported and in constant currency. Diluted earnings per share was $4.45 on a GAAP basis and $5.50 on a non-GAAP basis. • GAAP operating income in the fourth  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.19 billion = 61억 9,000만 달러; $6.19 = 6.19달러; $4.45 = 4.45달러; $5.50 = 5.50달러; $2.26 = 2.26달러.

billion and non-GAAP operating income was $2.82 billion. GAAP net income was $1.86 billion and non-GAAP net income was $2.29 billion. • Record cash flows from operations were $3.16 billion. • Exiting the quarter, Remaining Performance Obligations (“RPO”) were $22.52 billion, and Current Remaining Performance Obligations (“cRPO”) were 65%. • Adobe repurchased approximately 7.2 million shares during the quarter. Fourth Quarter FY2025 Business Segment Highlights • Digital Media segment revenue was $4.62 billion, which represents 11% year-over-year growth as reported and in constant currency. • Digital  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.82 billion = 28억 2,000만 달러; $1.86 billion = 18억 6,000만 달러; $2.29 billion = 22억 9,000만 달러; $3.16 billion = 31억 6,000만 달러; $22.52 billion = 225억 2,000만 달러; 7.2 million = 720만 달러; $4.62 billion = 46억 2,000만 달러; $1.52 billion = 15억 2,000만 달러; $2.82 = 2.82달러; $4.62 = 4.62달러; $2.29 = 2.29달러; $3.16 = 3.16달러; $22.52 = 22.52달러; $1.52 = 1.52달러; $1.41 = 1.41달러.

• Total Customer Group subscription revenue was $5.96 billion which represents 12% year-over-year growth, or 11% in constant currency. • Business Professionals & Consumers subscription revenue was $1.72 billion, which represents 15% year-over-year growth, or 14% in constant currency. • Creative & Marketing Professionals subscription revenue was $4.25 billion, which represents 11% year-over-year growth, or 10% in constant currency. FY2025 Financial Highlights • Adobe achieved revenue of $23.77 billion in FY2025, which represents 11% year-over-year growth as reported and in constant currency. Diluted earnings per share was $16.70 on a GAAP  Normalized numeric aliases: $5.96 billion = 59억 6,000만 달러; $1.72 billion = 17억 2,000만 달러; $4.25 billion = 42억 5,000만 달러; $23.77 billion = 237억 7,000만 달러; $25.20 billion = 252억 달러; $8.71 billion = 87억 1,000만 달러; $5.96 = 5.96달러; $1.72 = 1.72달러; $23.77 = 23.77달러; $10.99 = 10.99달러; $16.70 = 16.70달러; $20.94 = 20.94달러; $25.20 = 25.20달러; $8.71 = 8.71달러.
